subcodes.first_line: O thou who art mentioned before the Wronged One! Today the blessed Lote-Tree of the Bayán proclaimeth at the very axis of creation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها المذکور لدی المظلوم امروز سدره مبارکه بیان در قطب امکان باین کلمه
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power of the Manifestation of God, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @chastisement and requital, @call to action, @lack of formal education of the Manifestation of God
